title: REMP: A Swin Transformer-Powered Approach to Classifying Rare and Endangered Medicinal Plants
abstract: A customized Swin Transformer classified 16 rare and endangered medicinal plant species with 98.46% accuracy, supporting technology-assisted identification and conservation.
venue: 2025 International Conference on Quantum Photonics, Artificial Intelligence, and Networking (QPAIN)
